appDescription.message: Multi-window tab management application, simple dedup/grouping/sorting in one click

actionTitle.description: The title shown when hovering over the extension icon.

optionsDescription.message: Configure how your tabs are automatically organized and cleaned up.

groupNameAriaLabel.description: Aria label for group name input.

addDomainLabel.description: Label for adding a new domain.

groupingBehaviorLabel.description: Label for the grouping behavior section.

ungroupSingleTabLabel.message: Ungroup groups that only contain one tab
ungroupSingleTabLabel.description: Checkbox label for ungrouping single tab groups.

keepTabsPerWindowLabel.message: Keep tabs grouped per window (or limit number of windows)

processGroupOnChangeLabel.message: Automatically group/dedup when tabs are created or removed
processGroupOnChangeLabel.description: Checkbox label for automatic grouping on tab changes.

keepTopWindowsLabel.message: Keep top windows by tab count:
keepTopWindowsLabel.description: Label for limiting number of windows.

invalidDomainAlert.message: Please enter a valid domain (e.g., google.com or www.google.com)
invalidDomainAlert.description: Alert message for invalid domain input.

splitUrlColumn.description: Table header for Split URL column.

groupNameColumn.description: Table header for Group Name column.

noRulesMessage.description: Message shown when there are no rules.

ruleExistsAlert.description: Alert message when a rule for a domain already exists.

invalidUrlAlert.message: Invalid URL or domain format. Please try again.
invalidUrlAlert.description: Alert message for generic invalid URL/domain.

splitByPathAriaLabel.message: Split by url path segment index
splitByPathAriaLabel.description: Aria label for split by path input.

removeRuleAriaLabel.description: Aria label for remove rule button.
